name: Ley Lines
author: Eric Solomon (2019); Abstract Games factory
description: Ley Lines (Eric Solomon, 2019): on an 18x18 field of hexagons, white stones are scattered at random (>=6 per zone). Your ring single-steps around the board, and when it surrounds a stone it jumps along a straight ley line to the next stone, capturing every white one it visits. Sweep an entire line in one turn (after a step) to score it double. Highest score wins.
